programme.title: Carlos Manuel
programme.desc: Programa focado na obra e na carreira de uma das maiores figuras do Sport Lisboa e Benfica. Carlos Manuel, tal qual era, na visão jornalística de Leonor Pinhão. O craque, as épocas, os treinadores, os atletas lembrados por quem tinha de escrever páginas sobre o Sport Lisboa e Benfica, no jornal A Bola. Carlos Manuel e Leonor Pinhão, com a moderação de Ricardo Palacin.

programme.title: Benfica 10 Horas
programme.desc: Bloco informativo dedicado ao Benfica e aos desafios em que se encontra envolvido.

programme.title: Benfica No Feminino
programme.desc: Em poucos anos, o número de modalidades femininas no Sport Lisboa e Benfica cresceu ao ponto de corresponder ao número das masculinas. O termo “sexo fraco” é obsoleto, sinal do passado, e na competição do clube menos sentido faz nos dias que correm. Benfica no Feminino é o programa que vira os holofotes para as mulheres do SLB, atletas e treinadoras.

programme.title: Protagonista
programme.desc: O sucesso desportivo mede-se pelos títulos e pelas conquistas, mas há sempre algo que os protagonistas deixam por dizer, na hora da vitória. A marca que deixam, como se preparam para o sucesso, os segredos mais bem guardados de quem nasceu para ganhar. Histórias de sucesso, forradas de benfiquismo em meia hora de conversa.

programme.title: Vermelho Claro
programme.desc: Não é encarnado nem é cor-de-rosa, é Vermelho Claro. E Vermelho Claro é o programa da BTV dedicado às marcas, aos eventos mais mediáticos do momento e às celebridades. Todas as semanas, um convidado conhecido do grande público é entrevistado, tendo como palco o Estádio da Luz. Um programa de Carlos Dias da Silva.

programme.title: Pelas Casas Do Benfica
programme.desc: Informação sobre as casas do Benfica e delegações do clube espalhadas pelo País. Curiosidades, imagens de posters e recordações das décadas anteriores, testemunhos de sócios e simpatizantes que seguem o Sport Lisboa e Benfica onde estiver e onde jogar.

programme.title: A Carrinha Do Bento
programme.desc: Um dos veículos mais míticos da história do Benfica, a Carrinha do Bento, o transporte do “grupo do Barreiro”, vai percorrer o país à procura das melhores histórias, dos protagonistas e da recuperação de momentos incríveis do SL Benfica. Com Carlos Manuel ao volante e com a presença de glórias do Benfica, a viagem na Carrinha do Bento culmina com a presença perante o auditório benfiquista.

programme.title: DAZN F1
programme.desc: Ao quarto Grande Prémio da Temporada, a McLaren conquistou o maior número de pontos deste ano e, pela primeira vez, foi a equipa que mais pontuou, fruto do 1-2 na Sprint e de um 2-3 no Grande Prémio. Será este o indicador de que a McLaren voltou? É daqui que partimos para a conversa com Lourenço Beirão da Veiga, João Amaral, João Carlos Costa com moderação de Óscar Góis.

programme.title: MEGA Fights T1 - Ep. 47
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights Carlos Manuel Baldomir, aka 'Tata' (42-9, 12 KOs) vs. Arturo 'Thunder' Gatti (40-7, 31 KOs) in a bout to unify the WBC and IBA titles. The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 22, 2006.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League T2023 - Ep. 13
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts T9 - Ep. 2
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the CMX Weapons Championship and the Men's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 45
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the 21-0 James Kirkland facing off with the 21-1 Eromosele Albert. Just a little over a minute into this bout, following a combination of punches, the bout comes to a close.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo T25 - Ep. 3
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 features Chiyotairyu, Aoiyama, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights T3 - Ep. 42
programme.desc: This episode features a Heavyweight bout between the unpredictable and unbeaten Tyson Fury as we works his way up the ranks taking on former champ Steve Cunningham, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!.

programme.title: MMA:30 T1 - Ep. 7
programme.desc: This episode features two-time UFC champion and Hall of Famer Randy 'The Natural' Couture and his buddies firing up their motorcycles for a good cause, plus an interview with one of MMA's biggest stars, 'Rowdy' Ronda Rousey. We've got another installment of the gun store challenge this time with Thiago Alves, plus we go behind the scenes for a photo shoot with ring girl Arianny Celeste, exclusively on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA T1 - Ep. 200
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features Amanda 'MadDog' Lino vs. Manon Fiorot from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA T1 - Ep. 200
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features Amanda 'MadDog' Lino vs. Manon Fiorot from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 T1 - Ep. 28
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Light Heavyweight Unification battle as WBO Champion Jean Pascal (25-1, 16 KOs) takes on undefeated IBO Champion, Chad Dawson, (29-0, 17 KOs) on August 14, 2010 at the Bell Centre in Montreal, Quebec, Canada.

programme.title: Mega Fights In 60 T1 - Ep. 29
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a Super Welterweight, 10 Round contest featuring Joel Julio (34-2, 31 KOs) vs.undefeated James Kirkland, aka 'Mandingo Warrior' (24-0, 21 KOs) from the HP Pavilion in San Jose, California, USA on March 3, 2009.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior T7 - Ep. 10
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Orlando Qualifier tackle the Orlando Finals course, which includes the Salmon Ladder, Cannonball Alley, Helix Hang and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 43
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight championship fight featuring Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. This epic bout would prove to be the last of Calzage's career. Many wanted him to retire because he had nothing left to prove, and Calzaghe would officially do so 3 months later. Also on the card, Chris Arreola shows everyone why he is a heavyweight contender.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo T25 - Ep. 4
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 features Abi, Kakuryu, Hakuho and Shodaii from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Judo for the World T1 - Ep. 14
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Hague Grand Prix and we follow some of Netherlands' judo heroes as they try to mark the event with a medal tally to be proud of. .

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston T1 - Ep. 1
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA T2 - Ep. 6
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! In this episode from St. Petersburg, Russia, Khalil Ibrahim throws a flurry of fists against Bill Mahood in a three round fight.

programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Hague Grand Prix and we follow some of Netherlands' judo heroes as they try to mark the event with a medal tally to be proud of. .

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston T1 - Ep. 1
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA T2 - Ep. 6
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! In this episode from St. Petersburg, Russia, Khalil Ibrahim throws a flurry of fists against Bill Mahood in a three round fight.

programme.title: MEGA Fights T1 - Ep. 22
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features the IBF Welterweight title bout, Jan Zaveck, aka 'Mr. Sympathicus', (31-1, 18 KOs) vs. Andre Berto (27-1, 21 KOs) from Beau Rivage Resort and Casino in Biloxi, Mississippi, USA, on September 3, 2011.

programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.title: MEGA Fights T1 - Ep. 42
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights 'Sugar' Shane Mosley (43-4, 37 KOs) and Luis Collazo (27-2, 13 KOs) fighting over the interim WBC title. This fight took place at the Mandalay Bay Resort and Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA, on February 10, 2007.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts T9 - Ep. 3

programme.title: Judo for the World T1 - Ep. 15
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Tokyo Grand Slam where the home nation is looking to dominate as they fielded 7 of Japan's 8 world champions. Plus we catch up with Japan's brother and sister superstars, the Abe's.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! T1 - Ep. 39
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Andre Berto defending the WBC welterweight title against former WBA champion Luis Collazo. Each fighter had their own share of getting stunned throughout the bout, and the judges' decision at the end will have some controversy. Also on the card, kickboxing takes center stage as super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita takes on Gokhan Saki.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo T26 - Ep. 1
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, Show 1 features Kotoshoho, Terunofuji, Hokutofuji and Tochinoshin.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights T3 - Ep. 41
